title: Applicable Rules
description: Structured list of runtime rules selected for a screen brief. This contract references rules; it does not redefine instruction-language or guideline content.

brief_id.description: Identifier of the screen brief this rule selection applies to.

must.description: Non-negotiable rules selected from the guidelines.

should.description: Strong recommendations selected from the guidelines.

may.description: Allowed exploration options selected from the guidelines.

hard_blockers.description: Critical failures that must prevent or trigger repair of a proposal.

source_guidelines.description: Guideline paths used as the source of truth for this selection.

id.description: Stable local identifier for the selected rule reference.

summary.description: Short summary of the selected rule for traceability.

source.description: Guideline path or section where the rule is defined.

reason_selected.description: Why this rule applies to the current brief.
